name: Lantern Arc Reactor MK II Confidence Model
meaning: Proof-weighted confidence scorecard for moving from garage prototype to public platform without fake certainty.
currentPhase: Movie 1 garage proven; Movie 2 proof loop forming
confidenceRule: Scores rise only from evidence receipts, observed outcomes, repeated validation, paid/user proof, and canary-passed automation. Ambition and aesthetic confidence do not raise the score.
raisesMovie2: 5 outreach sends recorded in the wallet ledger
1 paid pilot or hard rejection batch
1 public proof page or demo artifact
Discord lounge bot health check passes without leaking secrets
MCP canary validates actual exposed tools before any command execution
D: shrunk and dual boot readyForInstall=true
one workflow used by someone other than the operator
calibrationProtocol: Score miss/hit with Brier-style error thinking
Update confidence only after observed evidence
boundaries: No Discord-to-MCP command execution before canary
No v1.0.0 tag without operator approval
No store fee until product target is chosen
No medical or PPE claim without evidence
